protocol_attempts.record_trace: schematic only; no real empirical trace supplied
protocol_attempts.trace_claim: A counterfactual real protocol where the physical source generates a new observable/instrument algebra and perturbations cannot factor through any fixed chemistry, search, access, or schema model.

verdict.best_result: Assembly supplies a formal/local W2-W3 witness, but every real empirical assembly protocol attempted here factors through fixed chemistry, fixed search or stochastic exploration, bounded access, instrument/modeler schema, or fixed observable algebra. No W1 or W4 physical witness is found.
